form.formComment: Beaten favourite last start when second at Angers on April 1. Was victorious the start before at Agen on March 3. Decent effort last start. In the mix again.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Comes here second-up after a week. Lacklustre first-up performance when 13th over 2100m at this track beaten 31m by Jojo Toons in 6-11yo euro open restricted race on April 4 at $66. Even the minor placings look out of reach.

form.formComment: Last start 4th over 3100m at Angers, beaten 6.9m by Jolie Star in 6-11yo G3 international handicap on April 1 at $8.50. At her previous start 5th (25m) over 2800m at Vire beaten 17m by Katchi Quick in 6-11yo handicap on March 18 at $13. Cannot be left out of calculations.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, 10th over 2700m at this track beaten 74m by Homard Land in 7-11yo euro open on March 27 at $60. Before that 7th over 2925m at Cagnes-sur-Mer, beaten 32m by Hooper Des Chasses in 7-11yo race on February 20 at $9.40. Hard to find on recent performances.

form.formComment: Finished up last campaign with a win at this track, started this campaign 10th over 2850m at this track beaten 49m by Jilord Viva in 7-11yo handicap on February 17 at $132. Then last time won by 6.8m as favourite at Enghien beating Ikuro Jiel in 6-11yo euro open on March 6 at $2. Looking to others.

form.formComment: Began his campaign last start running disqualified at Enghien on March 6 over 2875m. Better off looking to others.

form.formComment: Racing consistently. Last start a big 4.2m win as favourite at Marseille-Borely beating Ialto D'hertals in 5-10yo G3 handicap restricted race on March 25 at $1.60. No reason he cannot get the job done again.

form.formComment: Resumed when beaten 8.6m fifth behind Chitchat over 2100m in a 7-11yo euro open restricted race on February 22. Sure to improve on first-up effort.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into seventh behind Ikuro Jiel at this track over 2700m in a 8-11yo race on January 25 at $4.10. Then a handy effort when beaten by 1.4m finishing second behind Jobspost at this track over 2100m in a 7-11yo euro open restricted race on March 21 at $10. Nice effort last time. Winning hope.
